payload.answer: BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false disables SQL debug output/execution. No memory_cards records can be retrieved via the requested debug SQL.
payload.decision: Do not execute/return SQL debug results; treat as unavailable due to disabled debug SQL.

entity_resolution.reason: The request explicitly disables BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED, so debug SQL execution/visibility is not available.

payload.intent: Run an SQL debug query against memory_cards with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

details: Debug SQL execution is blocked by BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.
Returned no memory_cards because the system cannot access debug SQL results under the given configuration.

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true and retry the same SQL request.
Use a non-debug memory retrieval pathway (if available) instead of direct SQL over memory_cards.
Request logs or diagnostics through an approved non-debug mechanism.
